name: CreditAssociates
description_short: CreditAssociates is a Dallas-based debt settlement firm founded 2016. BBB A+ accredited. Fees 15-25% of enrolled debt, no upfront cost. Reviewed by NerdWallet and Bankrate.
description_long:
CreditAssociates, LLC is a debt settlement company headquartered in Dallas, Texas, founded in 2016. The company specializes in negotiating unsecured debts — primarily credit cards, medical bills, and personal loans — for less than the full balance owed. CreditAssociates holds a BBB A+ rating with accreditation and has been reviewed by major financial publications including NerdWallet and Bankrate. The company reports average program completion in just over two years, which is faster than the 3-4 year timeline typical of many competitors.

The fee structure is 15-25% of enrolled debt, charged only after successful settlement — consistent with FTC regulations. CreditAssociates requires a minimum of $7,500 in qualifying unsecured debt for enrollment. The process follows the standard settlement model: clients stop paying creditors, accumulate funds in a dedicated account, and the company negotiates lump-sum settlements. Free consultations are available with no obligation to enroll.

BBB complaints mention stalled settlements, aggressive follow-up calls after initial inquiry, and program durations exceeding expectations. The company has approximately 2,531 Google reviews. Consumer feedback highlights friendly consultants and clear communication but also notes credit score drops (expected with settlement) and some creditors refusing to negotiate. No CFPB enforcement actions or state AG actions appear in public records.

When evaluating debt relief companies, consumers should compare settlement programs against alternatives like debt consolidation loans, which combine multiple debts into a single fixed-rate payment. Credit counseling through nonprofit agencies offers free budgeting help without impacting credit scores. For those whose credit has already been damaged, credit repair services can address inaccurate negative items on reports. Personal loans for bad credit may provide funds for debt payoff at lower rates than credit cards, and credit monitoring services help track progress throughout the recovery process. Consolidating high-interest balances into a single installment loan with a fixed rate can reduce total interest paid and simplify monthly budgeting.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

tiers.name: Debt Settlement Program
features: No upfront fees — pay only on results

pros: Uses CallRail call tracking for accurate visitor-to-customer attribution
Implements Heap Analytics for detailed user behavior insights
Maintains HTTPS security protocol and secure log-in functionality
Provides accessibility features including screen-reader mode (Alt+1)
Uses multi-layer cookie consent management to respect user privacy preferences
Offers customizable consent preferences allowing users to control data usage
Maintains separate cookie categories (Necessary, Functional, Analytics) for transparency
cons: Website content provided contains only cookie policy information with no actual service descriptions or pricing details
No specific information about debt settlement success rates, fee structures, or company credentials visible
Limited transparency about actual debt relief services offered or how they differ from competitors
No visible client testimonials, company history, or credentials (such as IAPDA membership or licensing) in provided content
Relies heavily on call tracking and analytics, potentially indicating aggressive lead-generation practices
best_for: Consumers with $7,500+ in unsecured debt seeking debt settlement from a BBB A+-rated Texas firm
Those who want a no-upfront-fee program with fees of 15-25% after successful settlement
Individuals in financial hardship who prefer settlement over bankruptcy
Borrowers who value NerdWallet and Bankrate reviewed settlement programs
diagnosis: CreditAssociates is a solid mid-tier debt settlement company with BBB A+ accreditation and NerdWallet/Bankrate coverage. Fees of 15-25% are within industry norms. The reported 2-year average completion is faster than many peers. BBB complaints about stalled settlements and aggressive sales calls are common industry issues. Compare directly against TurboDebt (higher review volume), National Debt Relief (more established), and Americor (dual settlement/loan model) before enrolling.
services: Cookie consent and data privacy controls
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
